Hassan Raza

Manual QA / SQA Engineer
Nadir Abad, Lahore Cantt • qa.hassanraza@gmail.com • +92 302 0533331 • linkedin.com/in/hassanrazaqa

Professional Summary

Detail-oriented Manual QA with 1+ year of experience delivering high-quality web and mobile applications. Skilled in API testing using Swagger, Postman, and Insomnia, and creating comprehensive test cases using TestRail to cover all project scenarios. Experienced in identifying and resolving bugs using Jira and Asana to enhance user experience. A collaborative team player committed to continuous improvement and delivering reliable software solutions.

Professional Experience

Junior SQA Engineer - FoliumAI | Wapda Town, Lahore
Feb 2025 – Present
Proactive Manual SQA Engineer testing web and mobile projects, performing API testing, creating documentation, and ensuring high-quality, reliable software.
  • Performed API testing using Postman, Swagger, and Insomnia for endpoint verification.
  • Developed and executed functional, regression, integration, and API test cases.
  • Created detailed project documentation including user flows and test strategy documents.
  • Identified, documented, and tracked bugs efficiently using Jira.
  • Contributed to multiple projects: Foster Ferret, WZRD Pro, SeedFunds, ShareMundo.
SQA Engineer (Intern → Junior) - Kreatorz.co | Lahore Cantt
Sep 2024 – Jan 2025
Performed manual testing for mobile and web applications, progressing from internship to junior SQA role, while ensuring software quality, identifying bugs, and improving overall user experience.
  • Created test cases and executed functional & regression testing.
  • Reported and tracked bugs using Jira with actionable insights.
  • Collaborated with developers for timely issue resolution.
  • Contributed to: Ride-Share App, Ryvato iOS App, Attendance Management System.

Professional Projects

Foster Ferret — Web & Mobile App
Ensured quality of multi-functional features including wellness check-ins, AI chat, Shopify integration, file storage, one-to-one chat, and multi-role dashboards.
  • Analyzed client requirements and created comprehensive test documentation.
  • Performed functional, regression, and UI/UX testing across browsers.
  • Conducted API testing using Postman and tracked bugs via Jira.
SeedFunds — Web & Mobile App
Delivered high-quality testing for SeedFunds platform featuring fund allocation, vendor management, Stripe payments, AI chat, Google Maps, and order tracking.
  • Designed and executed test cases for functional, regression, and integration testing.
  • Validated UI/UX consistency, timeline views, analytics, and multi-platform performance.
  • Performed API testing using Insomnia and managed bug reporting via Jira.
WZRD Pro — Web App
Ensured quality of WZRD Pro platform featuring admin dashboards, subscription management, user permissions, crypto learning modules, portfolio creation, risk calculation, and rewards system.
  • Designed and executed test cases for functional, regression, and integration testing.
  • Validated UI/UX, dashboards, and subscription workflows.
  • Performed API testing using Insomnia; verified security, permissions, and data integrity.

Technical Skills

Manual Testing: Functional, Regression, Integration, System, Exploratory Testing
QA Documentation: Test strategies, user flows, reports, and project docs
API Testing: Postman, Swagger, Insomnia
Cross-Platform Testing: Web, mobile, browser & device compatibility
Bug Tracking: Jira, Asana
UI/UX Verification: Responsive, intuitive, and consistent design validation
Requirement Analysis: Understanding requirements & creating scenarios
Root Cause Analysis: Investigating, prioritizing, and resolving complex bugs
Test Case Management: TestRail - creating, and executing test cases
Release Validation: Pre-release checks to ensure stability and quality

Soft Skills

• Presentation & Communication • Problem Solving & Critical Thinking • Attention to Detail • Team Collaboration • Continuous Learning • Time Management • Process Improvement
